---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why would this feature be useful? How does it relate to the project's goals (on-device search, reference implementation)?

## Proposed Implementation
If you have ideas for how this could be implemented, describe them here.

## Alternatives
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Drawings, links to related issues, or reference implementations.
